summary: Tested 4 features: 1) Dispatch form serial number selection for manufactured items - WORKING, 2) Admin dashboard Production tab - WORKING, 3) Admin dashboard Inventory tab - WORKING, 4) Admin dashboard Supervisor Payables tab with payment functionality - WORKING, 5) Test users removal - VERIFIED (support@musclegrid.in and accountant@musclegrid.in removed)

issues:
Console warning: 'In HTML,
cannot be a descendant of

' - non-blocking hydration warning in SKU lookup result display

critical_code_review_comments: Minor HTML nesting issue in AccountantDashboard.jsx around lines 1032-1041 where Badge component (renders as div) is nested inside a p tag
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are working correctly. Admin dashboard has 4 tabs (Overview, Production, Inventory, Supervisor Payables). Dispatch form shows serial number selection when selecting manufactured items. Test users have been removed from the system.

dispatch_form_serial_selection.details: When selecting a manufactured item (e.g., 48V Smart with Active Balancer) from the SKU dropdown, the 'Serial Number Selection (Required for Manufactured Items)' section appears with a dropdown showing available serial numbers

admin_dashboard_production_tab.details: Production tab shows production requests table with columns: Request #, Product, Firm, Qty, Status, Role, Created. Shows 693 production requests.

admin_dashboard_inventory_tab.details: Inventory tab shows stats (Master SKUs: 17, Raw Materials: 9, Low Stock Alerts: 49, Negative Stock: 0) and Current Stock table with SKU, Name, Firm, Type, Stock, Status columns

admin_dashboard_supervisor_payables_tab.details: Supervisor Payables tab shows stats (Total Payable: ₹1,280,500, Total Paid: ₹2, Pending Balance: ₹1,280,498, Total Records: 689) and payables table with Pay button for each unpaid record

payment_dialog.details: Payment dialog opens with fields: Payment Amount (₹) with data-testid='payment-amount-input', Payment Date with data-testid='payment-date-input', Payment Reference with data-testid='payment-ref-input', Notes, and Record Payment button

test_users_removal.details: Test users support@musclegrid.in and accountant@musclegrid.in have been removed. Current users have different email addresses (callsupport@musclegrid.in, aman@musclegrid.in, etc.)
